entry.title: 17th Industry Strategic Meeting Held in Madrid

entry.title: CMF Supports Maritime Security Cooperation During Exercise ALDABRA V
entry.summary: VICTORIA, Seychelles – Combined Maritime Forces (CMF), through Combined Task Force (CTF) 151, supported Phase 1 of Exercise Aldabra V in Seychelles alongside European Union Naval Force O…

entry.title: Operation Compass Rose VI Strengthens Maritime Cooperation
entry.summary: MANAMA, Bahrain— Combined Maritime Forces (CMF) successfully concluded Operation Compass Rose VI, its flagship multinational training engagement, April 20-22, 2026. This year, the engagem…

entry.title: Combined Task Force 151 Deters Piracy Off Somali Coast

entry.title: Combined Maritime Forces Maintains Operations During Middle East Conflict
entry.summary: MANAMA, Bahrain – Combined Maritime Forces (CMF) has continued to deliver operational outputs despite the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, maintaining uninterrupted maritime security activ…

entry.title: UK Assumes Command of Combined Maritime Forces’Combined Task Force 151
entry.summary: MANAMA, Bahrain – The U.K. Royal Navy assumed command of the Combined MaritimeForces (CMF) counter-piracy task force during a change of command ceremony, presided over by Navy Vice Adm. Curt Rensha…

entry.title: Indian Navy-led CTF 154 conducts staff training aboard INS Surat

entry.title: India Assumes Command of Combined Maritime Forces’ CombinedTask Force 154

entry.title: UK candidate for the International Court of Justice election 2026: Professor Dapo Akande, election brochure
entry.summary: This election brochure for Professor Dapo Akande explains his experience and credentials as the UK candidate for election as a judge to the International Court of Justice for 2027 to 2036.

entry.title: Safeguarding and protection from sexual exploitation and abuse and harassment (SEAH) in international work

entry.title: UK strategy on protection from sexual exploitation, abuse and harassment in international work
entry.summary: This strategy sets out how the UK will prevent and respond to sexual exploitation, abuse and harassment linked to international work.
